name: Paracetamol
treats: Fever, mild to moderate pain (headache, body ache, cold)
side_effects: Usually minimal; rarely allergic reactions, liver issues if overdose
precautions: Do not exceed recommended dose. Avoid with other paracetamol-containing medicines. Consult doctor in liver disease.

name: Amoxicillin
treats: Bacterial infections (ear, throat, chest, urinary tract)
dosage_notes: Usually 250mg or 500mg. TDS or as prescribed. Complete full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhoea, rash, allergic reactions in some
precautions: Complete full course. Inform doctor if allergic to penicillin. Not for viral infections.

name: Cetirizine
dosage_notes: Usually 10mg OD (once daily), often at night
side_effects: Drowsiness in some, dry mouth, headache
precautions: May cause drowsiness; avoid driving if affected. Consult if pregnant or breastfeeding.

name: Omeprazole
dosage_notes: Usually 20mg OD or BD, typically before breakfast
side_effects: Headache, nausea, abdominal pain in some
precautions: Take before food as advised. Long-term use only under doctor supervision.

name: Pantoprazole
dosage_notes: Usually 40mg OD before breakfast or as prescribed
precautions: Take before food. Inform doctor if on long-term use.
injection_purpose: IV form used in hospital for severe acidity or when oral not possible

name: Dolo 650
side_effects: Usually minimal; rarely allergic reactions, liver issues if overdose
precautions: Do not exceed recommended dose. Same as Paracetamol.

name: Crocin
precautions: Do not exceed recommended dose. Same as Paracetamol.
